prompt_text:
### Demographics: 42-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Body mass index category: Normal
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~6.2 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Insulin Glargine 15units once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 57.9 kg; Height 163.4 cm; BMI 21.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 112/67 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.8%; 9 months ago 10.0%; 6 months ago 10.5%; 3 months ago 11.0%; current 10.7%), FPG (12 months ago 219mg/dL; 9 months ago 274mg/dL; 6 months ago 229mg/dL; 3 months ago 320mg/dL; current 264mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 57.8kg; 9 months ago 54.8kg; 6 months ago 59.8kg; 3 months ago 56.8kg; current 57.9kg), Height (12 months ago 163.4cm; 9 months ago 163.4cm; 6 months ago 163.4cm; 3 months ago 163.4cm; current 163.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 112mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 69mmHg; 6 months ago 67mmHg; 3 months ago 69mmHg; current 67mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 8U/L; 9 months ago 6U/L; 6 months ago 14U/L; 3 months ago 8.0U/L; current 11U/L), AST (12 months ago 29U/L; 9 months ago 27U/L; 6 months ago 20U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 23U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; current 24mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 317mg/g; 9 months ago 249mg/g; 6 months ago 259mg/g; 3 months ago 379mg/g; current 325mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 90mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 96mg/dL; 3 months ago 91mg/dL; current 92mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 55mg/dL; 6 months ago 56mg/dL; 3 months ago 55mg/dL; current 54mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 176mg/dL; 9 months ago 161mg/dL; 6 months ago 181mg/dL; 3 months ago 177mg/dL; current 171mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.2g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 12.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.47 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
